title: Skill-First Package Operating Layer Closeout

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Make skills the preferred operating layer for package workflows
issue_classifications.evidence: Parent lane completed through #428 and #429: compact startup paths advertise task-shaped package skill routing while WORKFLOW.md remains the compatibility fallback.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Advertise task-shaped package skills in startup output
issue_classifications.evidence: `start`, full `preflight`, and startup defaults now expose advisory `skill_routing` with at least three task-shaped package skill routes and fallback behavior.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Keep WORKFLOW.md as a thin fallback while skills carry operations
issue_classifications.evidence: Installed `.agentic-workspace/WORKFLOW.md` and the packaged payload mirror now explicitly describe the file as a compatibility router/fallback and point capable agents to `agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "<task>" --format json`.

findings.title: Skill-first operating layer implemented
findings.evidence: Archived execplan `skill-first-package-operating-layer-2026-04-27.plan.json` records the promoted autopilot run, validation, direct CLI edit review, and issue closeout.
findings.notes: Remaining roadmap lanes are unrelated and remain inactive until promoted.

validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
